personality_one_liner: A premium, gamified command center for self-improvement—restrained, tactical, and operational with a sharp edge.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Empty space makes dense operational components feel premium, not cramped. Use strict flex rules; avoid manual top/left margins.

do's: Use blur on bottom tab bar, sticky headers over scrolling feeds, bottom sheets, and the Pro Paywall modal.
Pair blur with a dark tint overlay (≥75% opacity) to maintain high contrast.
dont's: Do not apply glassmorphism to normal feed cards or stats modules.
Do not blur primary buttons or input fields.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: A cinematic, immersive sequence to set baseline goals, establish tone, and dramatically reveal the user's starting rank (E - Awakened).

states.loading: Centered minimalist spinner with 'Calibrating system...' text.
states.error: Failed to sync rank. 'System Error: Tap to Retry'.

screens.layout: Full-bleed screens with dark, atmospheric visual elements. Use a sticky primary CTA at the bottom ('Continue'). Form elements like stat inputs must be clean, single-column rows with subtle borders. The final Rank Reveal uses the 'aura_background' image wrapped in a heavy top-to-bottom gradient scrim.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: The gamified command center displaying rank, aura, daily XP progress, today's 3 missions, and critical System Alerts.

states.loading: Skeleton loader for the hero rank card and 3 mission modules.
states.empty: N/A - the system always generates at least 3 daily missions.
states.error: Failed to load feed - display retry button in center.

screens.layout: Vertical scroll. Top section: Hero card containing Rank Badge, Level/XP Bar, and Aura. Followed by a 'System Alert' banner (borderStrong + brandTertiary background). Next: A bento-style grid of 'Today's 3 Missions' with quick-complete buttons (trigger XP haptic animation). Bottom: Weekly calendar summary strip.

screens.name: Missions
screens.purpose: A tactical checklist of daily, weekly, and custom missions with detailed breakdowns and completion status.

states.empty: Use 'workout_banner' with an overlaid message: 'No Active Missions. Request AI Coach for new tasks.'
states.error: Failed to sync missions. 'Network sync failed'.

screens.layout: Segmented control at the top (Daily / Weekly / Custom). Below it, a vertical list of mission cards. Each card uses surfaceSecondary with left-aligned icons, title, XP reward, and a right-aligned complete circle (checkbox). Clicking opens a bottom sheet with mission details, penalties for missing, and a large primary CTA to Complete.

screens.name: Log
screens.purpose: The quantitative tracker for nutrition (macros/water) and daily habits (sleep, reading, recovery).

states.loading: Spinner in the center of the ring components.
states.empty: Use 'food_scan_placeholder' illustration indicating 'Log your first meal to initialize nutrition tracking.'

screens.layout: Two-column grid at the top for Nutrition rings (Protein, Calories) and a wide horizontal bar for Water. Below, a vertical stack of Habit Toggle rows (Sleep, Reading, Recovery) using large pill-like switches. Include a floating action button (FAB) for adding new meals or habits.

screens.name: Analytics
screens.purpose: Deep-dive performance metrics displaying stat levels (Strength, Intelligence, etc.) and XP growth over time.

states.empty: Display 'Insufficient data for analysis. Keep logging.'

screens.layout: Radar chart or stacked horizontal bars mapping Strength/Intelligence/Discipline/Charisma/Creativity/Vitality (0-100). Below this, a line chart for 'XP over time' (using Reanimated for drawing animation). Cards are dense, border-driven, and highly analytical.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: The user's legacy: showcasing avatar, highest rank, total XP, aura, longest streak, and earned achievements.
screens.layout: Top section: Large Avatar overlaid on the 'aura_background' cover image (using gradient scrim). Bold typography for Name, Rank, Level. Below: A 3-column grid for key stats (Longest Streak, Total XP, Missions). Bottom section: A horizontal scrolling grid of 'Achievements' badges.

screens.name: Paywall
screens.purpose: A premium modal to upsell LevelUp Pro, highlighting AI Food Scan and advanced analytics.
screens.layout: Full-screen modal overlaid with glassmorphism. Centerpiece uses the 'workout_banner' or custom Pro graphic. Large, persuasive typography. Bulleted list of Pro features with checkmarks. Sticky bottom primary CTA 'Unlock Apex Status' spanning full width.

aura_background.alt: neon pink and purple light particles aura

food_scan_placeholder.alt: healthy dark aesthetic food scan placeholder

workout_banner.alt: minimalist dark aesthetic dumbbell gym background

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme Strategy: Stick strictly to the defined Dark-First Utility palette (#0A0A0C base, #534AB7 accent). Do not introduce any neon, gradients, or fantasy game cliches.
Typography: Use 'Inter' system font for a crisp, Linear/Things 3 premium look. Never use bold heavier than weight 500.
Component Structure: Favor clear, sharp cards with 1pt `border` or `borderStrong` rather than heavy drop shadows (Shadow tier 0).

Image Handling: Any background image (like aura_background in Profile/Onboarding) MUST have a vertical gradient scrim layered between the image and text (from transparent to at least 75% surfaceInverse/surface).
Terminology: Strictly adhere to app terminology—'System Alert', 'Missions', 'AI Coach'. Avoid 'quests' or generic game terms.
Glassmorphism: Use it specifically for sticky elements (tab bar, headers, Pro Paywall modal) paired with a heavy dark tint (opacity >= 75%) to maintain text readability.
Interaction: Make completing a mission feel tactical and instant, with haptic feedback implemented on the check action. Avoid slow cinematic animations for daily log actions.
